notes: v392 — 💼 Portfolio → ⏳ Pending: you can now adjust a limit order's buy price without cancelling it. Each pending limit buy has a new ✎ price link — tap it, type a new price, and it keeps the same number of shares while re-reserving the cash (raise the price and it reserves a little more from your cash; lower it and the difference comes back). Your practice balance always stays consistent. (Market orders fill at the next day's open, so there's no price to change on those.) Practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
